name: room in the castle
description: I'm in a room in the castle
hints: There is a rabbit's foot here - a good luck charm.
GET FOOT - Medium Maegen said to keep a good luck charm. The rabbit's foot is one option.
GET FOOT (rabbit's foot = luck charm). UP returns to the kettle room above.
notes: Hidden room below the kettle (room 3) containing the rabbit's foot - one of the luck charms the Medium mentioned. UP returns to the kettle room.
